The documents revealed that many high-profile individuals, including politicians, business leaders, and celebrities, had used these shell companies to hide their wealth and avoid paying taxes. The leak also showed that some of these individuals had used their offshore accounts to engage in corrupt activities, such as bribery and embezzlement.
